name: Abstractiveness Metrics for Evaluating Text Summarization: A Refined Formulation with Empirical Validation
summary: arXiv:2607.10806v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantifying abstractiveness in generated summaries is essential for evaluating summarization models beyond surface-level metrics like ROUGE. We int...
description: arXiv:2607.10806v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantifying abstractiveness in generated summaries is essential for evaluating summarization models beyond surface-level metrics like ROUGE. We introduce Reference Abstraction (RA), Summary Abstraction (SA), and Abstraction Ratio (AR) -- a set of principled heuristic metrics that measure how much a summary diverges from extractive copying of the...
author: Praveenkumar Katwe, Rakesh Chandra Balabantaray, Kali Prasad Vittala
